source_intake_record.raw_question_text:
Hint: Please answer the question and provide the correct option letter, e.g., A, B, C, D, at the end.
Question: Assume that the threshold voltage of the N-channel MOSFET shown in <image> is \( +0.75 \, \text{V} \). The output characteristics of the MOSFET are also shown. The transconductance of the MOSFET is:

Choices:
A. \( 0.75 \, \text{ms} \)  
B. \( 1 \, \text{ms} \)  
C. \( 2 \, \text{ms} \)  
D. \( 10 \, \text{ms} \)
